title: Sri Lanka announces up to 3 hour power cuts from June 22-23
body_lines: ECONOMYNEXT – Sri Lanka will impose power cuts up to 3 hours on June 22 and 23 from 12 noon, Public Utilities Commission (PUCSL) Chairman Janaka Ratnayake said.
All areas (ABCDEFGHIJKLPQRSTUVW) will have power cuts for 2 hours and 30 minutes between 12.00 pm and 7.30 pm.
Between 6.00 am and 8.00 am, the Colombo City center will face a 2-hour power cut.
Between 5.00 am and 8.00 am, 3 hours’ power cut will be implemented in BOI industrial zones (MNOXYZ).
Download the feeder list from the annexure at the end of the schedule at this link. (Colombo/ June 21/2022)
